agents.purpose: Gather information, search case law, look up statutes, retrieve public records, and compile background research for legal/admin tasks.
agents.boundaries: Read-only except for saving research notes to docs/. Cannot draft legal filings.

agents.purpose: Draft legal documents, affidavits, dispute letters, court filings, and correspondence based on research provided by Research Agent.
agents.boundaries: Draft-only. Outputs are saved as drafts and must pass through QA Agent before use.

agents.purpose: Verify legal citations, statutes, case references, and regulatory provisions. Ensure every legal assertion has a supporting citation.
agents.boundaries: Read-only. Cross-references citations against verified sources. Flags uncited assertions.

agents.purpose: Organize, hash-verify, and catalog evidence. Maintain chain of custody and evidence manifests for all case materials.
agents.boundaries: Write-local-only. Evidence manifests saved to artifacts/. Cannot delete or modify source evidence.

agents.purpose: Review all outputs before delivery. Check for errors, missing citations, formatting issues, broken links, and policy compliance.
agents.boundaries: Read-only review. Can reject outputs for revision but cannot modify them directly.

agents.purpose: Maintain repository health: run smoke tests, check CI status, audit dependencies, review PRs, and enforce repo standards.
agents.boundaries: Read-only for inspection. T2 for commits/pushes. Cannot merge without approval.

agents.purpose: Plan and repurpose content for social platforms. Manage content calendar, hashtag strategy, and cross-platform formatting.
agents.boundaries: Draft-only. Posts are saved as drafts and reviewed before any publishing.

agents.purpose: Plan music releases, manage metadata, coordinate distribution platforms, and track promotion timelines.
agents.boundaries: Draft-only. Release plans saved as drafts. No direct publishing.

agents.purpose: Triage incoming client communications, classify by case/urgency, extract key information, and route to the appropriate agent lane.
agents.boundaries: Read-only for existing data. Can create triage summaries and intake records.

agents.purpose: Enforce permission boundaries, verify audit trails, check for policy violations, and ensure all outputs meet safety standards before external action.
agents.boundaries: Read-only oversight. Can block outputs that violate policy. Reports to Isiah directly.
